runners.formComment: Finished fifth (22.60) last start at Shepparton. Prior to that had recorded eight minor placings in a row. Aided by the inside draw but prefer each-way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished fifth (22.60) last start at Shepparton. Prior to that had recorded eight minor placings in a row. Aided by the inside draw but prefer each-way.

runners.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 22.03 in a 8 length win at Warrnambool over 390m. The one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 22.03 in a 8 length win at Warrnambool over 390m. The one to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked on first turn.

runners.formComment: In the money at all her runs at this track and trip. Last start finished third on April 8 over 390m at this track behind Aston Summary, beaten 4.5 lengths (22.86) in a Mix 6/7. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.formComment: Last start winner at Healesville over 300m running a time of 16.88. Can measure up again with the right run.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on March 7 over 450m at this track behind Ash Intention beaten 12 lengths (26.15) in a Restricted WIN H. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

runners.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.

runners.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Sale but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching five minors in a row. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need the right run to feature.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Mix 6/7 on April 10 over 400m at Warragul behind Street Diva, beaten 4.5 lengths (23.04). Needs to find a bit more to test these.
